name: Hot Water Bath Basics
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the water-bath canner two-thirds full of water.
2. About 30 minutes before filling jars, bring it to a boil.
3. Use only new lids and canning jars free of nicks and cracks.
4. Wash, rinse, and air-dry jars.
5. Fifteen minutes before filling, place jars, funnel, and a half-cup metal measure in the canner rack; boil for 15 minutes.
6. Fill jars using a funnel and the metal measure for ladling, leaving a half-inch headspace.
7. Avoid splashing chutney onto the rim of the jar; wipe the rim if necessary.
8. Centre lids on jars and screw on bands until finger tight.
9. Return jars to canner. Cover and return to boil; boil for 10 minutes.
10. Let jars cool on a rack for 24 hours.
11. Check that lids curve downward. (If any don't, refrigerate to use within 3 weeks.)
12. Label and store in a cool, dry, dark place for up to 1 year.
